results.description: Using a 10-node workflow, read data.csv, drop null values, remove duplicate rows, filter rows where salary is greater than 35000, select name, department, region, salary, cast column types using an empty mapping, store into a SQLite database called d_employees.db in table employees, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows, group by department and count rows, then export to d_dept_counts.csv.
results.run_stdout:
[CSVParser] Loaded 23 rows from data.csv
[DropNulls] Dropped rows with null values
[DataDeduplicator] Removed duplicate rows
[DataFilter] Applied condition: salary > 35000
[ColumnSelector] Selected columns: ['name', 'department', 'region', 'salary']
[TypeCaster] Cast columns: {}
[SQLiteConnector] Stored table 'employees' in d_employees.db
[QueryEngine] Query executed
[ValueCountsOps] Computed value counts for ['department']
[CSVExporter] Exported to d_dept_counts.csv
d_dept_counts.csv
